scenarios.name: lock_signature_byte_flip
scenarios.description: Flip a byte in the lock receipt Ed25519 signature.

scenarios.name: exec_signature_byte_flip
scenarios.description: Flip a byte in the execution receipt Ed25519 signature.

scenarios.name: entry_weight_tamper
scenarios.description: Change the weight of the first entry. The recomputed entry hash no longer matches what was committed in the lock receipt.

scenarios.name: entry_add_fake
scenarios.description: Add a fake entry to the bundle. The recomputed entry hash differs from the committed value.

scenarios.name: drand_bls_signature_tamper
scenarios.description: Flip a byte in the bundle-level drand_signature. Does not break any receipt signature. All upstream steps pass; only BLS catches it.

scenarios.name: chain_break_lock_receipt_hash
scenarios.description: Modify the lock_receipt_hash inside the exec receipt payload and re-sign, breaking the chain linkage between lock and exec receipts while keeping the exec signature valid.

scenarios.name: seed_tamper_wrong_randomness
scenarios.description: Modify the drand_randomness inside the exec receipt payload and re-sign. The signature passes but the recomputed seed will not match.

scenarios.name: winner_rewrite
scenarios.description: Reverse the results array inside the exec receipt payload and re-sign. Seed recomputation passes (drand_randomness unchanged) but the recomputed winners will not match the reversed order.

scenarios.name: exec_entry_hash_tamper
scenarios.description: Modify the entry_hash inside the exec receipt payload (but not the lock receipt) and re-sign. Lock receipt entry hash passes; exec receipt entry hash fails.
